title: ADP vs Airtable
description: Compare ADP vs Airtable — a hr & people platform versus a project management solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: ADP (HR & People) and Airtable (Project Management) serve different primary purposes. Airtable has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is hr & people or project management capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between ADP and Airtable?
faqs.answer: ADP is a hr & people tool, while Airtable is a project management platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can ADP replace Airtable?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, ADP or Airtable?
faqs.answer: ADP (Custom) and Airtable (Free–$45/user/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
